articles.description: Jurgen Klopp says Mohamed Salah could carry on playing until the age of 40 after the forward leaves Liverpool at the end of the season.
articles.title: Jurgen Klopp: Mohamed Salah could play for six or more seven years

articles.description: Is former Aston Villa and Chelsea midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka, who has made 97 senior appearances across all competitions without playing a full 90 minutes, an exception or becoming the norm?
articles.title: Does Carney Chukwuemeka show the demise of a 90-minute player?

articles.description: Roy Hodgson's idea of celebrating 50 years in management is not to sit back reflecting on his career, but instead to return to the dug-out at Bristol City.
articles.title: Roy Hodgson: The remarkable return of ex-England boss aged 78

articles.description: McLaren's Oscar Piastri sets the pace in second practice at the Japanese Grand Prix ahead of the Mercedes of Kimi Antonelli and George Russell.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: Oscar Piastri heads Kimi Antonelli and George Russell in Suzuka Friday practice

articles.description: It's not a game England fans remember too fondly, but can you pick out the players who started the match?
articles.title: Football quiz: Name England's line-up from their 2014 World Cup match with Uruguay

articles.description: England opener Ben Duckett says greater professionalism is a major "priority" for him following a winter Ashes series blighted by off-the-field issues including claims of excessive drinking.
articles.title: Ben Duckett: England opener makes professionalism a priority after Ashes and excessive drinking claims

articles.description: Argentina great Lionel Messi has a stand named after him by his current club Inter Miami.
articles.title: Lionel Messi: Inter Miami name stand after Argentina great

articles.description: Former England goalkeeper Paul Robinson says set-piece expertise could give Thomas Tuchel's side an X-factor this summer.
articles.title: Could England's set-pieces win them the World Cup?

articles.description: England reached the World Cup with a 100% record but need to be tested - and friendly opponents Uruguay have the quality to do that.
articles.title: England: Will Uruguay be Thomas Tuchel's toughest test so far?

articles.description: The Diamond League's season-opening meet in Doha is scheduled to go ahead as planned but organisers are "exploring alternative options".
articles.title: Diamond League: Doha scheduled to go ahead despite Middle East war but options being explored
